title: Your Attention Is a Limited Battery
script_summary: Exploring how your brain manages attention like a limited battery.

segments.voiceover: Your attention is a limited battery.
Just like your phone, your brain has a finite amount of focus.
This concept is called selective attention. It’s how you prioritize information.
Cognitive load affects how much you can focus. More distractions? More mental drain.
So, if you feel drained, it’s not your fault. You’re just managing your brain’s battery.
Want to save your brain's battery? Follow for more tips!
